raw_consumer_statement: My credit was stolen, and charges were made from XXXX to XXXX. I reported the fraud as soon as I found out. I never use the card outside of Macy 's store. The fraud amount was about XXXX dollars. When I called the fraud department, they told me it was no need to file a police report. I sent additional information showing I was out of town in Florida when the purchases were made. I provided my airplane ticket and bank account statements showing I was in Florida while the card was being used in Washington XXXX.
